headline: 1 Semiconductor Stock to Target This Week and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: Semiconductors are the picks and shovels of modern technology. The amount of data we ingest is also increasing exponentially, leading to elevated demand for chips with more processing power. This secular trend bodes well for the industry, which has posted a six-month gain of 28.8% while the S&P 500 was down 2.3%.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Sees Iran Deal Or 'Hell'; Sandisk Leads 7 Stocks To Watch
summary: President Trump threatened huge Tuesday attacks, saying Iran will be "in hell" if the Strait of Hormuz isn't opened. A market rally attempt is underway, but look for this signal.
